items.claim: Ryan Gondra is a busy forward pressure striker who only moves in one direction.
items.quote: Busy forward pressure striker. He only moves in one direction.

items.claim: Ryan Gondra is not looking for takedowns and prefers to hold opponents against the cage to fire shots.
items.quote: He's not going to look for a takedown. Even if he gets you up against the cage, he's just going to hold you there and then fire away from the hip.

items.claim: Zack Reese is a big fighter for his weight class at 6'4".
items.quote: Pretty big guy for this weight class. He's 6'4.

items.claim: Zack Reese is inconsistent on the ground.
items.quote: If I had to put him in a single category on the ground, he is inconsistent.

items.claim: Zack Reese has great jiu-jitsu when fighting off his back.
items.quote: On his back, he's got great jiu-jitsu

items.claim: Ryan Gondra is too tough for Zack Reese to hammer.
items.quote: Ryan's a little too tough as well. He's also going to move forward.

items.claim: Zack Reese does not move his head and when he does, he moves straight back.
items.quote: this guy doesn't move his head and when he does move his head it's just straight back.
